caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black over-ear headphones, and a green t-shirt sits before a professional microphone in a room filled with framed photos on the wall and clothing racks in the background. His t-shirt features the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" in white and orange lettering. A white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt stands behind him to the right. In the lower corners of the scene, two logos are visible: one on the left and one on the right that reads "HOTLY TV". As the sequence progresses, the man speaks, shifting his gaze slightly and adjusting his facial expression. His head tilts slightly to the left as he continues to talk into the microphone, while the background setting and equipment remain static.
